text: Hi Vijay R, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?

content: CONTEXT SUMMARY: User engaged in a conversation of 10 turns but AI parsing was inconclusive. Assumed interested.

text: Yes, it's a good time. And what we have spoken recently.
XOptimus Smart Charger is really taking off lately! Sales are up by 25% month-over-month and our customers are loving the extra battery life they're getting with this new model.
Okay. Okay. Stop stop. Stop. I just want to know the price.
XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) is priced at ₹499. Would you like me to add it to your cart?
Well, I just call you up later. Let's hang up the call.
Sounds good! Take care and talk to you soon!
